deployed_by: Claude (claude.ai) via wrangler deploy from bash_tool
deploy_method: wrangler 4.98.0 — direct deploy from /home/claude filesystem, bypassing MCP tool payload size limit

phase3_changes.schema: lead_section, status, budget_range, timeline already existed in D1 — no migration needed
routes_fixed: GET /api/admin/leads — now passes req so PATCH and CSV branches are reachable
frontend_public: nav_cta section label on Free Estimate link
hero_chat section label on hero CTA (already existed)
lead_form section label on lead form submit
Budget Range dropdown added to lead form (lfBudget)
Timeline dropdown added to lead form (lfTimeline)
Standalone callback widget added below lead form (cb-widget)
submitCallback() function wired to POST /callback with lead_section=callback_widget
frontend_admin: Status dropdown per lead row — onChange calls PATCH /api/admin/leads/{id}
Status dropdown per callback row — onChange calls PATCH /api/admin/callbacks/{id}
Export CSV button on leads table
Export CSV button on callbacks table
Budget and Timeline columns in leads table
lead_section column visible in both tables

routes_verified: GET / — public site loads, v0.3.0 in footer
GET /admin — admin panel loads, password demo
GET /api/status — ok:true, version:0.3.0, all bindings green
POST /leads — saves lead_section=lead_form, budget_range, timeline to D1
POST /callback — saves lead_section=callback_widget, preferred_time to D1
PATCH /api/admin/leads/2 — status updated to contacted, ok:true
PATCH /api/admin/callbacks/2 — status updated to scheduled, ok:true
GET /api/admin/leads?format=csv — CSV with 12 columns including lead_section, budget_range, timeline
GET /api/admin/callbacks?format=csv — CSV with 9 columns including lead_section, status
bugs_fixed_during_phase3: Select string escaping: >'> was being parsed as end of JS string — fixed to >" (proper close of html+= string)
Callbacks CSV was querying non-existent source column — removed from SELECT
Callbacks INSERT was using wrong column order (source before lead_section) — fixed to match actual schema
deploy_tooling_note: MCP deploy tools (cloudflare-multipart-mcp, cf-multipart-vnext-r2) cannot handle files >~10KB as JSON string parameters. Going forward, use: wrangler deploy from bash_tool with CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN env var. Next session should build a GitHub Action (.github/workflows/deploy-workers.yml) so git push triggers auto-deploy.

what_is_missing.github_action_deploy: No GitHub Action yet — each deploy still requires wrangler from bash_tool with API token
what_is_missing.media_library: No file upload UI in admin, no media grid, no R2 browser
what_is_missing.article_manager: No publish/draft toggle, no article editor, no public article HTML pages
what_is_missing.site_customizer: Phone, company name, colors all hardcoded — not in D1 site_config table
what_is_missing.email_notifications: notified flag not implemented, no Resend integration
what_is_missing.analytics_dashboard: No lead source breakdown chart, no weekly lead counts

next_phase: Phase 4 — Admin Advanced: Article Manager, Email Notification Routing, Site Customizer. Also build GitHub Action for auto-deploy.
